title: Earnings Preview for Twist Bioscience
text: This Benzinga earnings preview covers Twist Bioscience's (NASDAQ: TWST) quarterly earnings report scheduled for November 23, 2020. Analysts anticipated the company would report a loss of $0.70 per share with revenue around $22.67 million. The previous year's same quarter showed a loss of $0.96 per share on revenue of $15.74 million. If results matched estimates, earnings would improve 27.08% year-over-year, while sales would grow 44.06% compared to the prior year period. As of November 19, 2020, shares traded at $114.50, having climbed 381.86% over the preceding 52 weeks. The company's earnings call was scheduled for 8:00 AM ET. The article notes that investors should not be surprised to see the stock move on comments made during its conference call, highlighting how management commentary typically influences investor reaction during earnings announcements.
